text: 英語 聽力 模擬 視題
四
第一節
聽下面五段對話
每段對話後有一個小題
從題中所給的
A B C 3個選項中選出最佳選項
聽完每段對話後
你都有十秒鐘的時間
來回答有關小題和閱讀下一小題
每段對話僅讀一遍
現在你有五秒鐘的時間
閱讀第一小題的有關內容
You seem happy
Is it because you're moving to a new house soon?
No, I'm going to a party tonight
Nice, is it a birthday celebration?
Actually, my best friend just graduated from university
We'll celebrate a new chapter in his life
Hey, I heard your school basketball team is doing great
Yeah, the team has had five straight wins
It must be thrilling to watch them play
Sure, everyone is excited
and can't wait to watch their performance in the final match
Why are you pacing back and forth?
I'm about to give the speech in front of the whole class today
I have butterflies in my stomach
Relax, you've practiced enough in front of your mom and me at home
Just be yourself
Amy, you look down
What happened?
Just now, someone jogged my elbow
Making me spill my coffee all over my new novel
Oh, that's too bad
We've solved all the basic problems
I think we can start the project tomorrow
We'd better spend another day or two doing in-depth research
Jumping in could cause a lot of avoidable issues
The first step is to get to the end
The second step
Listen to the fifth step of the conversation or the second step
The conversation or the second step
There are a few questions
From the questions given by ABC3
Choose the most chosen one
Listen to the conversation or the second step
You'll have time to read each of the questions
Each of the questions is five seconds
After listening, each of the questions will give out five seconds to make time
Each of the questions is two times more than a hundred
Listen to the next one
Answer the question six and seven two questions
Now, you have ten seconds to read these two questions
Are you free this afternoon?
Can you accompany me to the animal shelter?
Why do you plan to go there?
Want to be a volunteer?
No, I'm going to adopt a dog for a little mic
You know, it will be children's day and five days
That will make him happy?
Yes, I took him to the animal shelter yesterday morning
He showed me the one that he really liked
I wonder what hell name it?

Yes, I took him to the animal shelter yesterday morning
He showed me the one that he really liked
I wonder what hell name it?
I never really thought about it to keep money
Actually no, back in 1873, the jeans inventor Levi Strauss solved a particular problem
With this tiny pocket to safely keep the pocket watch
My friend who works in the fashion industry told me that yesterday
Interesting, I had no idea that it had such a history
I'll search for more details about it now
Kayla, have you ever thought about what the small pocket on your jeans is for?
I never really thought about it to keep money

I've been thinking about going running to keep fit, but my brother says running might hurt my knees
He suggests I do yoga, but I'm tired of doing it
Practicing yoga can be relaxing, but I believe cycling suits you better
It's good for our heart and mental health
Plus, it's beneficial for our knees
I often advise my students to do that
Really? How does it help with knee problems?
Cycling is a good way to strengthen the muscles around the knees without causing much damage
It's a kind of low impact exercise
How did you know about these from short videos online?
No, I read a magazine article about a relevant study in our school library yesterday
The researchers asked 2,600 people about their physical activity and took x-rays of their knees
The x-rays showed signs of knee problems, but cyclists were actually 21% less likely to have these issues
Thanks for sharing the information, I'll definitely go cycling more often

Now you have 20 seconds to learn these 4 questions
Elizabeth, how was your weekend?
Quite tiring, I mainly did my spring cleaning
I washed the windows, dusted the shelves, mop the kitchen, and gathered lots of old things that I don't need
What will you do with the old things?
Throw them away, or donate them
I plan to donate them tomorrow
That's good
Well, what about you? What did you do?
On Saturday, I bought these 2 pieces of old furniture at a second hand market
They go very well with the decoration style of your home
Thanks, and on Sunday morning, I packed up all my winter clothes and stored them in a box
I relaxed at home in the afternoon, baking some cheese biscuits
and watching a TV series called Big Hero 6, The Series
Oh, I've heard of the show, but I haven't seen it
Is it appealing?
Yes, it's an American superhero TV series based on Disney's 2014 film

15 seconds and more than 3 weeks
On August 26th and 27th, The National Weather Service,
NWS, issued heat watches and warnings for parts of the United States
Extreme heat affected about 61 million people nationwide
The Midwest and Northeast saw record-breaking temperatures and soaring heat indexes
A heat index number measures how hot it feels outside
In addition to the actual temperature, it factors in humidity
Chicago, Illinois saw a heat index number of 115 degrees Fahrenheit
In some places, the back to school season was affected
Schools closed early and after-school sports activities were cancelled due to the dangerous heat
The NWS advised people of all ages to take care
On its social media accounts, it suggested that people take plenty of breaks in the shade
and drink plenty of water
In other places, weather conditions were very different
A storm swept through the Pacific Northwest, dropping three inches of snow on California's
Sierra Nevada Mountain Range
It was the first time in 20 years that snow fell in California in August
Meanwhile, three tropical storms brought flooding to Hawaii
According to the Environmental Protection Agency, extreme weather is becoming more common
The rise in global temperatures is associated with widespread changes in weather patterns
The agency said
